instructions.content: Before drafting the plan, scan existing plans with grep -r '^## ' .context/plans/*.md to infer local section conventions.
Always include YAML frontmatter with title, type: PLAN, status: DRAFT, and date in YYYY-MM-DD format.
Structure the plan body with phases (sequential stages), tasks (single-session units), and waves (parallel task groups).
Run validate-context-frontmatter.sh on the created plan file before declaring done.
Offer to run the plan-review skill on the newly created plan to complete the create-review-iterate loop.
NEVER create a plan without YAML frontmatter — the file will be invisible to .context/index.yaml.
NEVER create a phase with more than 8 tasks — split oversized phases into smaller ones.
